channel.title: Marta Marchlewska on @ameliazein
channel.description: Recent content in Marta Marchlewska on @ameliazein

item.title: Religiously permissible consumption: The influence of the halal label on product perceptions depending on the centrality of religiosity
Explicit Versus Implicit “Halal” Information: Influence of the Halal Label and the Country-of-Origin Information on Product Perceptions in Indonesia
